summary: Implemented IC-4 as a shell script (tools/ci/check-ic4-kernel-boundary.sh) with 6 checks: (1) no deep imports into @archon/kernel/src/ internals, (2) no imports from @archon/module-loader, (3) no imports from @archon/runtime-host, (4) no imports from @archon/cli or @archon/desktop, (5) no direct node:fs/node:child_process/node:net imports, (6) no forbidden packages in module package.json dependencies. Modeled after check-dep-graph.sh. Wired into CI as a named step replacing the IC-4 stub. Added pnpm check:ic4 convenience script. Verified: passes on current codebase, correctly detects deep kernel imports and direct node:fs violations.

verification.notes: Verified against current modules (PASS). Verified violation detection with injected deep kernel import (correctly FAILs). Verified violation detection with injected node:fs import (correctly FAILs).
